lingala.sr_imported: Organizer eyingisami — sikoyo kómisa yango ya yo
lingala.sr_reset: Bobongisi ezongisami na lolenge ya liboso
lingala.sculpt_failed: Kokata ekweaki — meka ndimbola ya pete.
lingala.assess_failed: Coach akokaki kopesa eyano te — meka lisusu.
lingala.sr_assessed: Eyano ya coach esili kobongama na nse ya builder panel
lingala.recall_needs_more: Liboso bakisá ata makanisi 4 na bituluku 2
lingala.sr_recall_started: Recall mode: makanisi nyonso ekwei na tray. Zongisá moko na moko na esika na yango.
lingala.sr_recall_complete: Otongi lisusu mokili na yo mobimba na nzela ya bomboko!
lingala.print_saved: One-pager ekitisami — fungolá yango mpe printá
lingala.import_replaces: Oyo ekozongisa composition na yo ya sikoyo.
lingala.title: Bafolomi ya Bonsomi
lingala.tagline: Tongá Mokili na yo ya Bafolomi: poná archetypal structure, tondisá yango na makanisi na yo, bongisá na 3D, mpe katá oyo ezali na ntina.
lingala.tagline2: Awa yo ozali mokomi — AI kaka epesaka litambwisi, mpe kaka soki osengi.
lingala.keep_content_hint: Bituluku mpe makanisi na yo etikali — kopona foromi ebongolaka kaka lolenge ya esika.
lingala.recall_title: Recall: tongá lisusu mokili na yo
lingala.snapshot_tip: Bombá elilingi ya mokili na yo ya 3D
lingala.print_tip: Kitisá one-pager oyo ekoki koprintama (snapshot + makanisi na yo + eyano ya coach)
lingala.recall_tip: Makanisi na yo ekwei na tray — zongisá yango na nzela ya bomboko
lingala.assess_tip: Sengá AI coach atala composition na yo mobimba
lingala.recall_heading: Tongá lisusu na nzela ya bomboko
lingala.recall_instructions: Makanisi nyonso ekwei uta na esika na yango na tray ya nse. Poná likanisi moko na esika, na sima salelá group chips (to bafungola [ mpe ]) mpo na kozongisa yango na ndako. Eloko moko te ebombami na ntango ya lisano.
lingala.recall_complete: otongi lisusu mokili na yo mobimba!
lingala.title_placeholder: Mokili oyo ezali na ntina ya nini?
lingala.note_label: Note mpo na yo moko (emonanaka na 3D)
lingala.note_placeholder: Mpo na nini likanisi oyo efandi awa?
lingala.no_3d: Ekoki kokotisa 3D space awa te — builder panel na yo ezali kaka kosala, mpe nyonso oyo okomi ebombami.
lingala.stage_hint: Na esika: benda likanisi mpo na kotya yango · benda background mpo na kobaluka · scroll mpo na kozoom · [ mpe ] elongwisaka likanisi eponami kati ya bituluku.
